action_set_definitions.name: search_products
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for products based on specific attributes like recall status, category, or classification.

attribute_name.description: The attribute to filter by (e.g., 'recall_status' or 'hazmat_class').

attribute_value.description: The value of the attribute to match (e.g., 'Class 9 HazMat').

action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves facility identifiers and details based on their role or name in the distribution network.

facility_type.description: The role of the facility (e.g., 'MDC', 'Main Distribution Center', 'Regional Surge Facility').

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_and_forecast
action_set_definitions.description: Gets the current on-hand inventory level and the existing inbound forecast for a specific SKU at a specific facility.

sku_id.description: The unique identifier for the product.

facility_id.description: The unique identifier for the facility.

action_set_definitions.name: reallocate_forecast
action_set_definitions.description: Moves a specified quantity of forecast from one facility to another for a specific SKU to ensure network totals remain unchanged.

sku_id.description: The unique identifier for the product.

from_facility_id.description: The facility ID where the forecast is being reduced.

to_facility_id.description: The facility ID where the forecast is being redirected.

quantity.description: The amount of forecast to move.

state_description.current_period: The current time period for the forecast (e.g., '2024-Q3' or '2023-05').
state_description.products: List of products and their current forecasting metrics.
